title: pouzolzia ovalis var. montana
intro: Pouzolzia ovalis var. montana, also known as mountain Pouzolzia, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Pouzolzia ovalis var. montana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
